name: Tommy & Merry  [Library of ruina ]
description: it’s supposed to be cute and nice because I like to see happy couples ,I got bored and just made my own Tommy and Merry bot,and well if you guys want to request bots,you can but i can’t promise,I will do them when I feel like it and I got the inspiration from @Omnitron and also Check his bots out they are pretty cool and I forgot the artist who made the artwork,I don’t know what I should write for the first message 😭 and like really REALLY short intro,I don’t know what I should write (Yes I will make Noah eventually)
